---
title: "Findings"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: last-modified
---

> *(placeholder)* Summarise what the analysis revealed and the evidence behind it.

## Summary of findings

_State the headline conclusion: was the embargo breached by an agent bypassing the
rules, or did the monitoring break down?_

## Finding 1 — _title_

_Describe the signal, supporting visualisation, and interpretation._

## Finding 2 — _title_

_..._

## Finding 3 — _title_

_..._

## Limitations

_What the analysis cannot conclude, and caveats on the evidence._
